MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
W. Bryce Chastain, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS G. BEST 956-7654 moving to withdraw as attorney of record for the Plaintiff.

Counsel provided copies of papers to the Court. The Court having reviewed said documents, GRANTED the motion to withdraw. Order signed in open court.

Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
